title: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES SALEM MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING AND PSYCHIATRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual and group therapy. Assists individuals and families with reaching goals, managing emotions, healing from trauma, and more. Offers psychiatric assessments and ongoing medication management. Telehealth appointments available 2645 Portland Road NE Suite 120 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 390-5637 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 390-5637 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan, Medicare, and most commercial insurance plans. Sliding fee scale is available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6:30pm, Saturday 9am-4:30pm Services: Behavioral Learning Therapy Mental Health Related Support Groups Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
